summary: Futuristic Mining Dashboard - All 25 tests passed (14 backend + 11 frontend)

issues.description: Session state doesn't persist after navigation - when navigating to /mining directly without login, user is redirected to login. This is by design but could be improved with better session handling.
Growth Plan shows 'Expired' status in dashboard for test user - may need to verify subscription status handling

context_for_next_testing_agent:
Futuristic Mining Dashboard Testing Complete - Iteration 122

## Backend Tests (14 passed):
- Mining Status API: GET /api/mining/status/{uid} - Returns all required fields
  - mining_rate_per_hour (20.83 PRC/hr for base)
  - session_active, remaining_hours, mined_this_session (for circular timer)
  - referral_breakdown with level_1, level_2, level_3 data (for speed breakdown)
  - base_rate, current_balance, total_mined
- Mining Start API: POST /api/mining/start/{uid} - Starts 24hr session correctly
- Mining Claim API: POST /api/mining/claim/{uid} - Works for paid users, returns claimed_amount
- User Redemption Stats: GET /api/user/{uid}/redemption-stats - Returns total_earned for odometer
- Health Check: GET /api/health - Returns healthy status

## Frontend Tests (11 passed):
- All API validation tests via Playwright request API
- Login page loads correctly with mobile/PIN input
- Full login flow works and reaches dashboard
- Navigation to mining page via Rewards tab works

## UI Components Verified via Screenshots:
1. Speedometer Gauge - Shows mining speed at 20.8 PRC/hr with animated arc
2. Circular Timer - Shows PRC Earned, time remaining (24:00:00), TAP TO COLLECT
3. Odometer Counter - Shows total mined with digital display
4. Current Balance Card - Shows 97,063.56 PRC
5. Speed Breakdown Section - Base Rate, Direct(L1), Level 2(L2), Level 3(L3), TOTAL SPEED
6. VIP Badge - Shows VIP status for paid users
7. Back Button - Navigates back to dashboard
8. Tap to Collect - Successfully collected 1.07 PRC, session reset, balance updated

- Mobile: 9421331342

- Subscription: growth (paid)

- mining-collect-button: Circular timer center button
- back-button: Header back navigation button
- upgrade-button: Free user upgrade CTA (not visible for paid users)
